Container.Name: secondbrain-voice-gateway
Container.Overview:
SecondBrain voice gateway for Amazon Alexa.
Features: - SecondBrain REST queries - Home Assistant live state - allowlisted Home Assistant actions - Docker status via docker-socket-proxy - concise Alexa-friendly speech answers
Important: - Build the image locally on Unraid first with tag `secondbrain-voice-gateway:local` - Start `secondbrain-docker-proxy` before this container - Edit the YAML files under /mnt/user/appdata/secondbrain-voice-gateway/configs/ - Enter the API tokens directly in the masked template variables - Keep this container on the same Docker network as your SecondBrain containers

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the gateway API and local testing endpoints. Host port 8001 avoids conflict with Paperless on this system.

Config.Name: Configs Directory
Config.Description: Directory with YAML alias and troubleshooting configuration files.

Config.Name: Environment
Config.Description: Application environment label written to logs and debug snapshot.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.

Config.Name: Request Timeout
Config.Description: Timeout in seconds for upstream requests.

Config.Name: Debug Endpoints
Config.Description: Enable /debug/snapshot only in trusted environments.

Config.Name: Alexa Skill IDs
Config.Description: Comma-separated allowed Alexa Skill IDs. This default matches the current SecondBrain Voice skill.

Config.Name: Allowed Alexa User IDs
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated Alexa user IDs. Set this to your own Alexa account ID to keep the skill effectively private even behind a public HTTPS endpoint.

Config.Name: Verify Alexa Signature
Config.Description: Keep true in production. Set false only for controlled local testing.

Config.Name: Alexa Reprompt
Config.Description: Enable Alexa reprompts for follow-up questions.

Config.Name: SecondBrain Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL of the existing SecondBrain REST API. This default matches your current SecondBrain-App host IP and port mapping.

Config.Name: SecondBrain Query Path
Config.Description: SecondBrain query endpoint path.

Config.Name: SecondBrain Health Path
Config.Description: SecondBrain health endpoint path.

Config.Name: SecondBrain Query Field
Config.Description: JSON field name used for SecondBrain POST /query.

Config.Name: SecondBrain Bearer Token
Config.Description: Bearer token for the SecondBrain API. Enter it directly here if SecondBrain auth is enabled.

Config.Name: Home Assistant Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL of Home Assistant. This default matches the current Home Assistant host in this environment.

Config.Name: Home Assistant Token
Config.Description: Long-lived Home Assistant token entered directly in the template.

Config.Name: Home Assistant Alias Config
Config.Description: YAML file containing entity aliases and allowlisted actions.

Config.Name: Docker Proxy Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL of the docker-socket-proxy container on the same Docker network.

Config.Name: Docker Monitor Config
Config.Description: YAML file listing monitored containers and first checks.

Config.Name: Include Docker Log Hints
Config.Description: Include one short summarized log hint when a monitored container looks unhealthy.

Config.Name: Docker Logs Tail
Config.Description: How many recent log lines the adapter should inspect.

Config.Name: Troubleshooting Config
Config.Description: YAML file with grounded troubleshooting guidance.

Config.Name: Enable AI Mode
Config.Description: Enable optional AI fallback for ambiguous routing and answer compression.

Config.Name: AI Base URL
Config.Description: Official OpenAI API base URL. This gateway uses the Chat Completions endpoint under this base URL.

Config.Name: AI Model
Config.Description: OpenAI model for routing fallback and answer compression. GPT-4o mini is a fast, affordable model for focused tasks.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: OpenAI API key entered directly in the template when AI mode is enabled.
